questions.text: When you host friends at your place — whether for a dinner party, watching a game, or just hanging out — what's your hosting style? Do you go all out with prepared food and drinks, keep it casual with snacks and good music, or does it depend on who you're hosting?

What's your music setup like? Do you have a favorite speaker or headphones, do you host music listening sessions with friends, play an instrument, or just stream through your phone? What songs or artists have been on repeat lately?

When you're on vacation or taking time off, what's your ideal breakdown? Do you prefer an action-packed itinerary with activities every day, a mix of planned things and free time to wander, or do you mostly just want to relax, read, and not commit to anything?

What's your home aesthetic — are you minimalist with clean lines, do you love filling your space with plants and character, or do you have a specific style (mid-century, boho, industrial)? Any preferred furniture brands or places you shop for home items?

How do you handle gift-giving — do you prefer experiences over things, do you keep a running wishlist of things you actually want, or do you love finding creative personal gifts for others? Any budget range you consider standard for different occasions?
